questions.question: What is the primary function of the Data Link Layer?
expectedPoints: The primary function of the Data Link Layer is to ensure that data is transmitted reliably and efficiently over a network.

questions.question: Explain the difference between a linear block code and a cyclic code.
expectedPoints: Linear block codes use a linear combination of data bits.
Cyclic codes use a cyclic shift of data bits.

questions.question: What is the purpose of a checksum?
expectedPoints: The purpose of a checksum is to detect errors in data transmission.

questions.question: Explain the purpose of PPP.
expectedPoints: The purpose of PPP is to transmit data over a point-to-point link.

questions.question: Explain the purpose of MAC.
expectedPoints: The purpose of MAC is to control access to a shared medium.
